title: PRIM
description: Given an array of integer numbers with 5 elements and for each of its elements, find the smallest prime number which is not less than that element.
input:
The first line shows the number of test cases (T).

For each test case, we will have an array of integers (I) with length n in space-separated format.

  • 0 < I < 106
  • 0 < n < 106
output: Print the sum of obtained prime numbers for each test case.
source: ICPC, Regionals, Asia West Continent, Afghanistan, Asia-Kabul ICPC Regional Contest 2018
